expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly includes: "Data label visibility — default" and "Data label visibility — toggle off/on" (visibility), "Label density boundary — threshold characterization" (density), and multiple "Overlap-sensitive outcome" sections (dense slices, very small slices, responsive resize, long label text) that call out overlap/legibility and hide/skip behavior.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled "Phase 4a — Subcategory Draft Coverage" and is structured as subcategory-first draft scenarios with stepwise action chains and observable verification leaves (e.g., "Observe..." -> assertions), matching the stated intent in execution_notes.md: "Output is a Phase 4a subcategory-only draft... with atomic action chains and observable verification leaves per phase4a-contract."
